apps.name: Trellis
apps.subtitle: Personal tasks, habits & planning.
apps.localizedDescription: Trellis is a personal task, habit and planning app: a compressed-time Today timeline with tasks, habits, calendar events and travel legs.

versions.localizedDescription: Habit timeboxing: nest habits inside events too. A habit's graph screen now has a 'Timebox today' picker to slot today's occurrence under an event (native or your Google/Apple calendar events); timeboxed habits appear nested under their block on the Today timeline alongside tasks.

Timeboxing: nest tasks inside events. New backend-stored events show on the Today timeline; a task's detail has a Timebox picker to slot it under an event (including your Google/Apple calendar events), and timeboxed tasks appear nested under their block. Add events with the new toolbar button on Today.

Groceries: new tab with a per-category shopping list (check items off as bought). Contexts: Personal and Work merged into one tab with a toggle. Plus the in-app habit contribution graph, tappable habit widgets, and two-line widget titles.

Widgets: fixed the habit picker showing no habits (dev/stable no longer share a container), and habit cells now shade by progress like the Obsidian tracker — partial completions and over-target days included. Composed habits (e.g. Tidy the house) now show partial progress.
Habit Streak widget (GitHub-style contribution graph per habit). Also: project renamed to Trellis.
Calendar events, travel legs, drag-to-reschedule, and the overdue group.
